tasks.title: Locate Open AI Tutor Assistant button component and event handler
tasks.description: Identify the React component or UI module that renders the Open AI Tutor Assistant button. Locate the current icon used and the event handler responsible for opening the chat popup.
acceptanceCriteria: The source file(s) containing the button component and icon usage are identified
The event handler or method that triggers the chat popup is located
tasks.expectedResult: Source file with the Assistant button and popup open handler identified

outputPlan.description: File containing the Open AI Tutor Assistant button component and event handler

metadata.inputContext: Project source code and UI components
targetArtifacts: Assistant button component location and event handler details
evidence: Icon usage and click handler identified
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the exact location and code context to update the button icon and fix popup

tasks.title: Replace Open AI Tutor Assistant button icon with chat icon in AssistantButton.tsx
tasks.description: Modify the AssistantButton component in src/components/aiTutor/AssistantButton.tsx to replace the current icon with a chat icon. Ensure the icon is imported correctly and used in the button JSX.
acceptanceCriteria: The button icon is replaced with a chat icon
The icon renders correctly in the UI
tasks.expectedResult: AssistantButton.tsx uses chat icon instead of previous icon

outputPlan.description: Update icon import and usage to chat icon

metadata.inputContext: AssistantButton component source code and icon usage
targetArtifacts: Updated AssistantButton component with chat icon
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Button icon visually updated to chat icon

tasks.title: Fix chat popup opening logic in AssistantButton.tsx
tasks.description: Investigate and fix the event handler or method in AssistantButton.tsx that opens the chat popup. Ensure the popup opens correctly on button click, and any state or context controlling popup visibility is properly updated.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the AssistantButton opens the chat popup
No errors occur when opening the popup
tasks.expectedResult: Chat popup opens correctly when AssistantButton is clicked

outputPlan.description: Fix event handler to open chat popup correctly

metadata.inputContext: AssistantButton component event handler and popup state logic
evidence: No console errors related to popup
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Restores chat popup functionality on button click

tasks.title: Test AssistantButton chat icon and popup functionality
tasks.description: Perform manual and automated tests to verify that the AssistantButton displays the chat icon and that clicking it opens the chat popup without errors. Validate UI rendering and interaction.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat popup opens on button click
No UI or console errors occur
tasks.expectedResult: Code passes lint, typecheck, and tests; UI works as expected

metadata.inputContext: Updated AssistantButton component with chat icon and fixed popup logic
evidence: Manual UI verification confirms popup opens
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures the fix is verified and stable
